title: Quality Standards for Assay Development and Screening at CBCS
author: Chemical Biology Consortium Sweden (CBCS)
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This guideline describes routines and quality measures for data generated from assay development and screening at CBCS. The procedures and statistical measures are aligned with the routines of EU OPENSCREEN and ensure that CBCS conforms with the general criteria for high throughput screening internationally.
steps_raw: This guideline describes routines and quality measures for data generated from assay development and screening at CBCS. The procedures and statistical measures are aligned with the routines of EU OPENSCREEN and ensure that CBCS conforms with the general criteria for high throughput screening internationally.
